name: dMY Technology Group, Inc. IV
description: dMY Technology Group, Inc. IV was a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focused on identifying businesses in the consumer technology ecosystem, including consumer internet, gaming, digital media, and software-as-a-service (SaaS) sectors. In December 2021, the company completed its business combination with Planet Labs Inc., a leading provider of daily data and insights about Earth.
